summary: Full backend + UI validation of new versioned hook editing, EN/ES isolation, Spanish multi-variant manager, and /sp serving. All 8 pytest cases pass; full Playwright e2e flow (create → revise → history → reactivate → cleanup; Spanish create → /sp serving check → cleanup) passed end-to-end.

issues: Radix DialogContent missing Description/aria-describedby — a11y console warnings (non-blocking)

action_items: Optional: add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to hook-dialog and hook-move-dialog to silence Radix a11y console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2392 lines — should be split into routers (auth, hook_rules, leads, calls, spanish, ads) to stay under ~700 LOC per module.
POST /api/admin/hook-rules/{id}/revise correctly versions: archives old (enabled=false, archived=true, superseded_at/by) and creates new variant with revised_from link — clean implementation.
GET /api/admin/hook-rules?lang= properly filters by lang (default 'en') and separates active vs history; default fallback reflects lang-specific hook1/hook2.
resolve_hooks now filters by lang AND archived!=true — Spanish/English isolation enforced at serving time.
PUT /api/admin/hook-rules/{id} strips lang from update — language is correctly immutable post-create.
AdminSpanish renders <AdminHooks lang='es'/> inside data-testid='spanish-hooks-card' — testable & isolated.
seed_data_creation: All test variants (EN + ES with TEST_ prefix) were created and cleaned up by the tests themselves.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Versioned hook + EN/ES multi-variant feature is working e2e. test_hook_versioning.py covers: login, list w/ lang, create+revise+reactivate flow with cross-lang isolation, /config/public?lang=es serving check, and auth gates. The Playwright UI test in the previous run also verified: 'New version launched' toast, OLD wording disappears from active list, appears in hooks-history with history-restore-<id> button, ES variant ONLY in Spanish tab, /sp hero-hook1 shows ES text, / unaffected. Cleanup is automatic.
